title: Cheesy Casserole Quesadillas
description: A twist on traditional quesadillas, these cheesy casseroles are perfect for a quick and easy Mexican-inspired meal.

ingredients.name: Melted Cheese
ingredients.amount: 1 cup shredded cheddar and Monterey Jack cheese blend

instructions: In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat. Add the sliced Polish sausage and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
In a separate bowl, combine the melted cheese and cooked pasta. Mix well to combine.
Brush the tortillas with a little water and place them on a flat surface.
Spoon the pasta and cheese mixture onto half of each tortilla, leaving a 1/2-inch border around the edges.
Top the filling with the cooked sausage and fold the tortillas in half to enclose.
Place the quesadillas on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 10-12 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and the tortillas are crispy.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
Garnish with chopped fresh cilantro, sour cream, salsa, and guacamole, if desired.
